description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad white bands encircling its midsection, both of which appear slightly faded and dirty, suggesting outdoor use. The surface shows visible signs of wear, including dirt accumulation and some discoloration, especially near the base and along the white stripes. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The base is thick, flat, and appears to be made of a heavier material, likely rubber, to prevent tipping. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two wide white bands and a thick, square base, showing signs of outdoor use and dirt accumulation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cone's pointed tip, two white bands, and a slightly dirty, wide square base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the even spacing of the white bands and the pronounced dirt and wear on the base.
description_view_2: Rear view with similar features, but the white bands appear slightly more faded and the base shows more dirt.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, with the cone's tip and bands visible, and the base showing rounded corners and surface grime.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white stripes encircle the cone, one near the middle and one closer to the base. Both are approximately equal in width and are likely intended to be reflective, though they appear dirty and faded.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, and thick, made of black rubber with visible dirt and wear. It is designed for stability and appears slightly weighted.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The cone appears worn and dirty, with visible discoloration and surface grime, especially on the base and white bands.
